result.summary: The page is mostly usable, but several elements appear clipped or obscured, especially on the right edge and near the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right side; the “Hot Games” tab is only partially visible, making the label unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the tab row has proper horizontal scrolling behavior, padding, or responsive sizing so each tab can be fully viewed.

issues.description: Game tiles in the main sections are partially cut off on the right edge. If this is intended as a carousel, it lacks clear scroll affordance; otherwise it appears like horizontal overflow.
issues.suggestion: Use a clearly scrollable carousel pattern with visible spacing/peek behavior, or constrain the grid/cards to the viewport width.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game content, causing cards at the bottom of the screen to be partially hidden behind the nav bar.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content equal to the bottom navigation height.

issues.description: The hero carousel arrows sit very close to the screen edges, with the right arrow partially clipped by the viewport edge.
issues.suggestion: Inset carousel controls slightly from the edges and ensure they remain fully visible on mobile widths.
